 ↑↓ move ▕ ↹ section▕ ↵ open ▕ pgup/pgdn scroll body▕ e edit  ▕ c comment       
 + label ▕ - unlabel▕ a owner▕ A unassign           ▕ x close ▕ r reopen        
 p parent▕ b block  ▕ l link ▕ N child              ▕ L layout▕ esc back        
 ? help  ▕ q quit
